productDisplayName: Clarks Men Gofor Life Brown Casual Shoe
description: This clarks men Gofor Life high-top shoe is the essence of the brand's signature style. This shoe has the essence of the man-about-town nonchalance. It pays tribute to the Texas cowboy lifestyle with its stitch detailing and suede overlays on the upper. Pair it with distressed jeans, casual check shirt and a tonal belt to recapture the masculine flamboyance of the Wild West. Upper Leather derby style upper for durability and style Suede overlay on the midfoot support Lace-up system for a snug, customized Fit Lightly padded collar and tongue for in-step comfort and a snug fit Leather lining to absorb moisture and keep feet dry Cushioned nubuck footbed for all-day comfort Pull loop for wearing ease Midsole TPR midsole referencing wood Outsole Slip-resistant TPR outsole for better shock absorption and grip Textured patterning on the outsole for enhanced traction Stacked heel for ergonomic comfort and style Shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
